name: sgcindy-delphi
description: Use when writing Delphi or FPC code that uses the eSeGeCe sgcIndy library (a maintained fork of Indy: TCP/UDP clients and servers, and protocol components for HTTP, SMTP, POP3, IMAP, FTP, SSH/SFTP, Telnet, NNTP, DNS and more). Provides the public component API (properties, methods, events), the unit/uses mapping, and demo source examples, for developers who do not have the library source.
